---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for DiffSentry
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's painful or missing today? If this relates
to a review surface (walkthrough, inline comments, a scanner, a `@bot` command,
the dashboard), name it.

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you discarded them.

## Scope

- [ ] Review engine / scanners / insights
- [ ] `@bot` chat commands
- [ ] Web command center (SPA / `/api/v1`)
- [ ] Configuration (`.diffsentry.yaml`, env vars)
- [ ] Notifications
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Examples, mockups, links to how other tools handle this, or anything else that
helps make the case.
